## Tutorial checklist

- [ ] Demo code runs end-to-end without errors
- [ ] All links in the tutorial resolve (no 404s)
- [ ] Frontmatter `tags:` field is filled in
- [ ] Tutorial appears correctly in `mkdocs build --strict` (no warnings)
- [ ] Screenshots / output blocks reflect current behaviour
- [ ] Added to `nav:` in `mkdocs.yml` (if new page)
- [ ] Cross-posted or noted in `cross-posts/` if applicable
